WELCOME TO AKNAN

AKNAN was established in 2007 to serve human as well as asset and has grown to become the faster Contracting & Trading Est. in the SAUDI ARABIA.

The company’s core business focuses on Civil Works such as Building Painting Works, Installation of Tiles & Marble Works, Gypsum Board Work & Electrical & Plumbing Works Services with our highly trained and experienced technicians & Engineers. One of its division has been providing services to Major Residential, Commercial, Hospitals and Clinics in Saudi Arabia .

Our major work to Hospital are Flame Retardant and Antibacterial Curtains and Surgical Equipment. AKNAN is also among the leading distribution of Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial safety and hardware Products in the Saudi Arabia for almost decade.
